label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 17

extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Jonas won stage 17 to Angliru after VINGEGAARD and ROGLIC dropped KUSS on final climb, with KUSS retaining red by 8 seconds after taking bonus seconds.
tactical_patterns: VINGEGAARD and ROGLIC attacked together on Angliru while KUSS asked radio for slower pace, exposing team hierarchy conflict.
Bahrain Victorious exhausted CARUSO and POELS pacing LANDA early, leaving him isolated when decisive accelerations came in final 6km.
KUSS sprinted hard at finish specifically for 4-second bonus, revealing he knew he needed every second to retain jersey.
ROGLIC didn't wait for VINGEGAARD sprint pass attempt at line, prioritizing stage win over team hierarchy display.

rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: negative: requested slower pace on radio when teammates attacked, suggesting inability to follow rather than team tactics
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: attacked with VINGEGAARD despite teammate in red, showing form peaked perfectly for final week mountain stages
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: moved within 8 seconds of lead despite not taking stage win, displaying stronger form than earlier Vuelta stages
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: isolated after Bahrain burned CARUSO and POELS early, couldn't follow when race exploded inside final 6km
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: negative: lost over a minute to podium contenders, dropped from 4th to outside medal positions on queen stage
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: attacked early for KOM points on teammate KATANOSAKA's pacing, tactically securing polka dot jersey before Angliru
